name: jpyc-agent
description: Plugin sample for connecting Codex to the OAuth-protected JPYC Agent MCP endpoint.

interface.shortDescription: Use JPYC agent wallet, transfer, and contract workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A plugin sample that bundles the JPYC Agent MCP endpoint and a bundled skill for wallet lookup, balance checks, quote-first JPYC transfers, and contract read or write flows on Polygon.
defaultPrompt: Use JPYC Agent MCP to check my wallet list and balance.
Use JPYC Agent MCP to prepare a JPYC transfer quote before any state-changing action.
Use JPYC Agent MCP to inspect a contract and only propose write actions after quoting.
